name: Sales Qualification
problem: SDRs manually score leads against ICP criteria.
story: 250-seat security buyer routed to Senior AE per ICP rules.

data_sources.name: Open Data Hub B2B patterns
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

data_sources.name: MEDDIC sales methodology (patterns)
data_sources.note: Synthetic facts modeled on open patterns; no PII

rules: IF EmployeeCount(x, n) AND SeatsAbove200(n) AND SecurityBuyer(x) THEN Route_SeniorAE(x)
IF EmployeeCount(x, n) AND SeatsBelow50(n) THEN Route_SDR(x)

default.label: Route to Senior AE
default.explanation: Enterprise security buyer — routed to Senior AE.
